articles.title_en: A legitimate target or a war crime? Russian commentators can’t agree on Ukraine’s Wildberries strikes.
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries warehouse complexes in Elektrostal (outside Moscow) and Kotovsk (Tambov region). Eight people were killed and dozens were injured; preliminary estimates put sellers’ losses at more than 150 billion rubles, according to Meduza.
articles.title_raw: A legitimate target or a war crime? Russian commentators can’t agree on Ukraine’s Wildberries strikes.
articles.lead_raw: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries warehouse complexes in Elektrostal (outside Moscow) and Kotovsk (Tambov region). Eight people were killed and dozens were injured; preliminary estimates put sellers’ losses at more than 150 billion rubles, according to Meduza.

articles.title_en: ‘We lived in peace, and now they’re bombing us’: Ukraine hit two huge Wildberries warehouses near Moscow and in Tambov, killing eight. A correspondent went to see how one town is coping.
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian forces struck two of the largest warehouses operated by Wildberries, the Russian online retailer — one in Elektrostal, outside Moscow, and the other in Kotovsk, a small city in the Tambov region, near the regional capital. The two attacks left 80 people injured, and eight employees at the Kotovsk warehouse were killed.

articles.title_en: Eight killed, 77 injured in Ukrainian attacks on Belgorod over past day
articles.lead_en: The Ukrainian armed forces attacked Russia’s Belgorod Region 153 times
